@if (filter) {
@if (breakpointService.isDesktop()) {
@for (filterStmt of filter.statements; track filterStmt; let i = $index) {
@if (i < (filter.statements.length - 1) && filter.statements.length > 1) { }
}
} @else {
@for (filterStmt of filter.statements; track filterStmt; let i = $index) {
@if (i < (filter.statements.length - 1) && filter.statements.length > 1) { }
}
}
}
